records.source_title: There is (still) too much aluminium in infant formulas
records.statistic_scope: Non-soy formula powders, prepared estimate; source reported prepared estimate range
records.substitution_rule: source-reported summary statistic; no percentile inference
records.notes: Deterministic parse of Burrell 2010 Table 2 non-soy powder prepared estimates. Range is source-scope product-format range, not p50/p90/p95. Powder replicate maxima are not mixed with prepared-for-feeding values. Auto-promoted from deterministic local candidate after confirmed local-PDF match.

records.source_title: The aluminium content of infant formulas remains too high
records.statistic_scope: Non-soy formula powders, prepared estimate; source reported prepared estimate range
records.substitution_rule: source-reported summary statistic; no percentile inference
records.notes: Deterministic parse of Chuchu 2013 Table 2 non-soy powder prepared estimates. Range is source-scope product-format range, not p50/p90/p95. Soy-based products remain separated. Auto-promoted from deterministic local candidate after confirmed local-PDF match.

records.source_title: There is (still) too much aluminium in infant formulas
records.statistic_scope: Ready-made non-soy formula products; source reported product mean range
records.substitution_rule: source-reported summary statistic; no percentile inference
records.notes: Deterministic parse of Burrell 2010 Table 1 ready-made formula product means. Range is source-scope product-format range, not p50/p90/p95. Replicate maxima are retained in notes only because they are not product means. Auto-promoted from deterministic local candidate after confirmed local-PDF match.

records.substitution_rule: source-reported summary statistic; no percentile inference
records.notes: Deterministic parse of Chuchu 2013 Table 1 ready-to-drink formula product means. Range is source-scope product-format range, not p50/p90/p95. Auto-promoted from deterministic local candidate after confirmed local-PDF match.
